title: ClassificationResponse
description: Strict shape of the JSON returned by the classification@v1 prompt (D-P5 / SPEC-phase-1-minimum.md §3.3). Used by Layer1ClassificationParser to reject malformed LLM output before downstream gating + Observation emission. Enum is the 8-category Phase 1 starter taxonomy — calibration loop via D-P11 review surface will refine per D-63.
